---
title: "PBMC UMAP — All Combinations"
author: "foo cheung"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(knitr)
```

# Grid Overview (All groupings × All reductions)

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/grid_group_All_samples.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/grid_group_HC_only.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/grid_group_Severe_only.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/grid_group_Treated_only.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/grid_group_Untreated_only.png")
```

# Side-by-Side Reduction Comparison

## All samples

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_All_samples_Condition.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_All_samples_Pool.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_All_samples_Monaco.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_All_samples_Subject.png")
```

## HC only

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_HC_only_Condition.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_HC_only_Pool.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_HC_only_Monaco.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_HC_only_Subject.png")
```

## Severe only

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Severe_only_Condition.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Severe_only_Pool.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Severe_only_Monaco.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Severe_only_Subject.png")
```

## Treated only

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Treated_only_Condition.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Treated_only_Pool.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Treated_only_Monaco.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Treated_only_Subject.png")
```

## Untreated only

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Untreated_only_Condition.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Untreated_only_Pool.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Untreated_only_Monaco.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/sbs_Untreated_only_Subject.png")
```

# Per-Subject Panels

## All samples

### Per subject

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_All_samples_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_All_samples_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_All_samples_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

### Per subject × pool

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_All_samples_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_All_samples_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_All_samples_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

## HC only

### Per subject

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_HC_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_HC_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_HC_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

### Per subject × pool

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_HC_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_HC_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_HC_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

## Severe only

### Per subject

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Severe_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Severe_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Severe_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

### Per subject × pool

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Severe_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Severe_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Severe_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

## Treated only

### Per subject

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Treated_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Treated_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Treated_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

### Per subject × pool

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Treated_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Treated_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Treated_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

## Untreated only

### Per subject

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Untreated_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Untreated_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_panels_Untreated_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

### Per subject × pool

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Untreated_only_No_Harmony.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Untreated_only_Harmony__pool_.png")
include_graphics("umap_outputs/subj_pool_panels_Untreated_only_Harmony__subj_pool_.png")
```

# Monaco Summary — All filters × All reductions

```{r}
include_graphics("umap_outputs/summary_monaco_all.png")
```
